mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lawyer_info (user_id, license_number, firm_name, specialization, experience_years, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{licenseNumber}, #{firmName}, #{specialization}, #{experienceYears}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u INNER JOIN lawyer_info li ON u.id = li.user_id WHERE u.role = 'lawyer' AND u.status = 'active'
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR li.specialization LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR li.firm_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.avatar, li.firm_name, li.specialization, li.experience_years, li.total_consultations FROM users u INNER JOIN lawyer_info li ON u.id = li.user_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.role = 'lawyer' AND u.status = 'active' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE lawyer_info SET total_consultations = COALESCE(total_consultations, 0) + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
